records.definition: Basic structural and functional unit of living organisms.
records.search_text: cell | клетка | Basic structural and functional unit of living organisms. | biology

records.definition: Biological membrane separating the interior of a cell from the external environment.
records.search_text: cell membrane | клеточная мембрана | Biological membrane separating the interior of a cell from the external environment. | biology
nucleus | ядро | Membrane-bound organelle containing genetic material. | biology

records.definition: Material within a cell excluding the nucleus.
records.search_text: cytoplasm | цитоплазма | Material within a cell excluding the nucleus. | biology

records.definition: Organelle involved in cellular energy production.
records.search_text: mitochondrion | митохондрия | Organelle involved in cellular energy production. | biology

records.definition: Biological macromolecule composed of amino acids.
records.search_text: protein | белок | Biological macromolecule composed of amino acids. | biology
deoxyribonucleic acid | дезоксирибонуклеиновая кислота | Molecule carrying genetic information. | biology
DNA | ДНК | Abbreviation for deoxyribonucleic acid. | biology

records.definition: Outcome of an action or study.
records.search_text: result | результат | Outcome of an action or study. | common
method | метод | A procedure or approach. | common
